headline: What's Behind Ford's Windshield Wiper Recall of 400K Vehicles?
summary: F recalls 422K+ vehicles over faulty wiper arms that could fail or detach, raising visibility risks; dealers to inspect and fix free.

headline: Tesla vs. Ford: Don’t Buy Either Stock Until You Read This
summary: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) and Ford (NYSE:F) closed 2025 with results that crystallize their diverging futures. Tesla reported fourth quarter earnings leaning into autonomy and AI while Ford showed a massive EV write-down but its commercial truck business posted its best numbers in years. Robotaxis and Regulatory Credits vs. Super Duty and Software Subscriptions Tesla’s automotive story ... Tesla vs. Ford: Don’t Buy Either Stock Until You Read This

headline: Ford Motor Company and Sharrow Engineering Scale Production of the Sharrow Propeller in Detroit
summary: DETROIT, April 09, 2026--Sharrow Engineering announced today it is scaling production of its patented Sharrow™ Propeller through a collaboration with Ford Motor Company’s Advanced Industrial Technology & Platforms (ATP) team, using advanced 3D sand-casting techniques thanks to connections made through the Michigan Central innovation ecosystem.

headline: GrowthLoop Names Co-Founders Anthony Rotio and Tameem Iftikhar as Co-CEOs
summary: GrowthLoop, a leader in agentic AI-powered marketing solutions, today announced the appointment of co-founders Anthony Rotio and Tameem Iftikhar as Co-Chief Executive Officers. With landmark partnerships with Fortune 500 customers like Costco, Albertsons, and Ford, GrowthLoop is accelerating its distribution across enterprise companies. Rotio, who most recently led the company's marketing and partnerships organizations, will be scaling the distribution of GrowthLoop's agentic, composable CDP for

headline: As EV load grows, utilities use managed charging to harness flexibility, lower costs
summary: Active managed charging can delay costly system upgrades while saving individual customers money on their bills, utilities, automakers and aggregators say, but a lack of standardized data-sharing is slowing adoption.

raw.headline: As EV load grows, utilities use managed charging to harness flexibility, lower costs

headline: Ex-Tesla exec explains GM's bold bet on personal autonomous cars
summary: Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi sits with DVx Ventures CEO and former Tesla executive, Jon McNeill, who says GM’s strength lies in its elite engineering and leadership. He explains why GM is betting on personal autonomous vehicles rather than shared experiences like robotaxis.

raw.headline: Ex-Tesla exec explains GM's bold bet on personal autonomous cars
raw.summary: Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi sits with DVx Ventures CEO and former Tesla executive, Jon McNeill, who says GM’s strength lies in its elite engineering and leadership. He explains why GM is betting on personal autonomous vehicles rather than shared experiences like robotaxis.

headline: Ford Truck Headwinds Test F-150 Franchise And Investor Valuation Thesis
summary: Ford Motor (NYSE:F) is contending with disruptions after a fire at key aluminum supplier Novelis affected material availability for its F-150 and F-Series trucks. The company is waiting on U.S. tariff relief decisions, as new rules increase exposure to higher input costs for core vehicle lines. A wide-scale recall involving hundreds of thousands of Ford trucks and SUVs adds safety, repair, and reputational pressures at the same time. For you as an investor, this news hits directly at the...

headline: Trump Cracks Down On 'Illegal' Chinese Airbags In Cars: 'Killing American Families,' Says Sean Duffy
summary: The President Donald Trump administration has cracked down on Chinese-made airbag inflators linked to fatal crashes.
